notes: Small SDTM-DM-style demo: inline DATALINES (15 demographic rows), derives AGEGRP, summarizes ARM*AGEGRP via PROC FREQ and ARM mean age via PROC MEANS. No external data. Repo is a SAS biostatistics macro library: 31 of 36 .sas files are pure %macro defs needing an external caller; the remaining 5 top-level scripts depend on external SDTM/ADaM/RAW/VTDATA libnames or a hardcoded Y:\ Excel path that aren't reproducible outside the original clinical-trial environment. Demo bundle was authored to give the owner a tangible first taste of running a SAS program on Jenner.
